mapper.select:
select u.*, n.ward_id, n.nurse_level from sys_user u left join sys_nurse n on u.id = n.user_id
u.role_id = 3
and u.username like concat('%',#{username},'%')
and u.phone like concat('%',#{phone},'%')
and u.identity_card like concat('%',#{identityCard},'%')
and u.real_name like concat('%',#{realName},'%')
and u.status = #{status}
select u.*, n.ward_id, n.nurse_level from sys_user u left join sys_nurse n on u.id = n.user_id where u.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user(username, password, phone, identity_card, real_name, role_id, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{identityCard}, #{realName}, #{roleId}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
insert into sys_nurse(user_id, ward_id, nurse_level, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{wardId}, #{nurseLevel}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select:
select u.*, n.ward_id, n.nurse_level from sys_user u left join sys_nurse n on u.id = n.user_id where u.id in
#{item}
mapper.update: update sys_user set status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() where id = #{id} and role_id = 3
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_nurse where user_id in
#{item}
